subject: Re:
body:
I didn't get them e-mail it to me

----- Original Message ----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, February 23, 2007 9:34:32 AM
Subject: 


Good morning,

Were you able to read my results before you left?  I do not know how to read 
medical information.  But I do know that I am lucky I don't have more damage 
than tears in my esophagus, exhausted and running short on fuel that really 
messes with my emotions and head and nerves.  Doing everything Robin and Dr. 
Diaz has asked of me (except join a gym! haha!) and that alone is terribly 
diffcult but I'm committed.  And thank you to you for helping me get to this 
better place.  I'll forever be your biggest fan.

Catherine
